creator: naddy@mips.inka.de
text:
The x11/XFree86-4 port does not build on alpha.
Port configuration: YES to everything.
50k-line log available, however this points to the problem:

bsd_axp.c:25: conflicting types for `AXP'
../../../../../../programs/Xserver/hw/xfree86/os-support/shared/xf86Axp.h:27: previous declaration of `AXP'
